title: Exact Duplicates, Boilerplate, Similarity, Canonicals, and Change Detection · Language Clinic: Exact Byte Text Hashes
summary: Tracking variants duplicate pages, shared navigation dominates hashes, a canonical hint suppresses evidence, and a similarity score is treated as proof of sameness. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the exact byte text hashes increment in content identity and change-evidence model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…
objectives: Keep response-byte, decoded-source, normalized-text, extracted-record, and report hashes distinct and version their transformations.
Distinguish temporary failure, redirect, noindex, permission loss, deletion, and absence from discovery before expiring prior records.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-content-dedup-change-3
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-content-dedup-change-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader report review.
# Operating constraint: the target owner must be able to pause the crawl.
# Changed case: change malformed markup or parser choice and preserve extraction provenance.
def worked_scraper_content_dedup_change_3(fetched_pages: int = 80, exact_groups: int = 7, near_groups: int = 5, changed_pages: int = 18, unsupported_equivalence_claims: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorizationworked3",
        "url5798",
        "response3dekrow",
        "treeworked35798",
        "frontier5798worked3",
        "report3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if fetched_pages < 1 or exact_groups < 0 or near_groups < 0:
        return False, fetched_pages, "dedup-count"
    if changed_pages < 0 or changed_pages > fetched_pages:
        return False, changed_pages, "change-count"
    if unsupported_equivalence_claims > 0:
        return False, unsupported_equivalence_claims, "similarity-overclaim"
    if exact_groups + near_groups < 2:
        return False, exact_groups + near_groups, "dedup-evidence"
    assert changed_pages <= fetched_pages and unsupported_equivalence_claims == 0
    return True, changed_pages, "bounded-content-identity"

# Evidence: scraper-exact-byte-text-hashes-1ypkg5
# Competency: scraper-exact-byte-text-hashes.
# Case 3990: a multilingual public-service site review.
# Operating constraint: all network and parser work must remain below explicit budgets.
# Changed case: replace a static fixture with an explicitly authorized dynamic case and restate the browser budget.
def evidence_scraper_exact_byte_text_hashes_1ypkg5(fetched_pages: int = 80, exact_groups: int = 7, near_groups: int = 5, changed_pages: int = 18, unsupported_equivalence_claims: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:

        "authorization1ypkg5",
        "url3990",
        "response5gkpy1",
        "tree1ypkg53990",

        "report5gkpy13990",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1ypkg5)) == 6
    if fetched_pages < 1 or exact_groups < 0 or near_groups < 0:
        return False, fetched_pages, "dedup-count"
    if changed_pages < 0 or changed_pages > fetched_pages:
        return False, changed_pages, "change-count"
    if unsupported_equivalence_claims > 0:
        return False, unsupported_equivalence_claims, "similarity-overclaim"
    if exact_groups + near_groups < 2:
        return False, exact_groups + near_groups, "dedup-evidence"
    assert changed_pages <= fetched_pages and unsupported_equivalence_claims == 0
    return True, changed_pages, "bounded-content-identity"
